response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has extensive experience in software development across multiple languages and domains, including significant C++ experience with National Instruments. However, his recent focus has been on TypeScript, Node.js, and other modern stacks, with limited evidence of recent C++ work, cloud platform solutions, or industrial automation expertise. His background in secure development practices and IEC standards is unclear. While he demonstrates strong architectural and problem-solving skills, his relevance to the specific C++/industrial automation role is uncertain.
strengths: Strong C++ experience (National Instruments, embedded systems)
Proven architectural and problem-solving abilities across diverse domains
Experience with event-driven architectures and high-performance systems
concerns: Limited recent C++ development (primary focus on TypeScript/Node.js)
No clear evidence of industrial automation or IEC 62443 cybersecurity standards experience
Lack of cloud platform (Azure) or messaging broker expertise mentioned
